news.t: Horizon Caps 2025 Buildout of ETF Lineup with Launch of Three Actively Managed Funds Providing Variety of Domestic and International Exposures

holdings.infoBox: FRGN is an equity ETF with a total of 297 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 4.38%, ASML Holding at 3.97%, Samsung Electronics at 2.53%, SK hynix at 2.00%, and The Toronto-Dominion Bank at 1.71%.

overview.description: The Horizon International Equity ETF (FRGN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides broad exposure to non-US companies. The fund employs tactical options overlay strategies. FRGN was launched on Dec 2, 2025 and is issued by Horizon Kinetics.

data.title: Horizon Caps 2025 Buildout of ETF Lineup with Launch of Three Actively Managed Funds Providing Variety of Domestic and International Exposures
data.text: International Equity ETF (FRGN), Small/Mid Cap Core Equity ETF (SMOX), and International Managed Risk ETF (SFTX) join the firm's lineup of goals-based solutions, bringing the firm's ETF lineup to 12 f...
